title: AutoCount POS Malaysia
description: AutoCount POS Malaysia for retail, F&B, and branch outlets, integrated with AutoCount Accounting, stock control, receipt printers, barcode scanners, and local implementation support.

faqs.question: What is AutoCount POS used for?
faqs.answer: AutoCount POS is used for front counter sales, cashier billing, barcode scanning, receipt printing, payment collection, stock control, and syncing sales data back to AutoCount Accounting.

faqs.question: Is AutoCount POS suitable for retail and F&B businesses in Malaysia?
faqs.answer: Yes. AutoCount POS supports retail counters, F&B outlets, and branch operations with front-end cashier tools and backend accounting, stock, and reporting workflows.

faqs.question: Can KSL help install AutoCount POS?
faqs.answer: Yes. KSL Business Solutions can advise on editions and modules, prepare the setup, and help with installation, training, and practical support.

facts.supportRegion: Malaysia, with local support from KSL Business Solutions in Pahang.

sections.heading: Overview
body: AutoCount POS Malaysia for retail, F&B, branch outlets, barcode scanning, receipt printing, stock control, and AutoCount Accounting integration.

sections.heading: Best fit
body: Retail shops that need fast cashier checkout, receipt printing, barcode scanning, and stock control.
F&B outlets that need a practical POS counter workflow with AutoCount backend reporting.
Businesses with multiple outlets that need sales, stock movement, and payment data connected to accounting.

sections.heading: Implementation support
body: KSL helps Malaysian SMEs choose the correct POS backend, front-end counter license, add-on modules, and implementation plan for real business operations.
